visual_description: A medium shot shows a group of people, mostly men, in what appears to be an office or a formal meeting room. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting it's handheld. In the foreground, a man with short, dark hair, wearing a dark blue collared shirt, looks down with a serious expression. To his left, another man in a light blue shirt is partially visible. In the background, other figures in similar attire are blurred. The Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the upper left corner of the frame. The audio features a female narrator speaking in a serious and informative tone, as if reporting on a criminal investigation. Her voice is steady and clear, conveying a sense of gravity and urgency. In the background, a low, tense, and slightly ominous musical score plays, creating a suspenseful and dramatic atmosphere that complements the serious nature of the narration. The narrator states, "排除有仇杀成分。" The camera pans slightly to the left, focusing on a woman with long, dark hair. She is looking forward with a concerned or focused expression. The man in the dark blue shirt is now more in the background, still looking down. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The camera cuts to a close-up
